name: visstream-backend
description: Production-grade backend for visStream watch party app

scripts.hls:demo:silent: rm -f public/hls/video*.ts public/hls/video.m3u8 && ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i testsrc=size=1280x720:rate=30 -f lavfi -i anullsrc=channel_layout=stereo:sample_rate=48000 -shortest -t 60 -vf format=yuv420p -c:v libx264 -profile:v main -level 4.0 -pix_fmt yuv420p -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k -ar 48000 -ac 2 -f hls -hls_time 4 -hls_list_size 0 -hls_playlist_type vod -hls_flags independent_segments -hls_segment_filename public/hls/video%03d.ts public/hls/video.m3u8
